description_long: This is a stylized doll with long, straight black hair styled in high twin ponytails, wearing a black sailor-style school uniform with a red necktie and a short pleated skirt. The doll's face features a wide, cheerful smile and dark, round eyes, with a pair of round, dark glasses perched on its nose. On its head, the doll wears a large, dark ushanka hat adorned with a red star emblem, giving it a distinctive, military-inspired look. The arms are slightly bent, with one hand raised and the other at its side, while the legs are posed as if in mid-step, adding a dynamic sense of movement. The outfit is completed with black knee-high socks, one of which has a red band, and black shoes. The overall appearance is both playful and detailed, with a strong visual theme combining school and military influences.
description: A stylized doll with long black twin ponytails, a black sailor school uniform, and a large ushanka hat with a red star. The doll has a cheerful smile, glasses, and is posed as if walking.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the long black twin ponytails, the back of the ushanka hat, and the pleated skirt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hair's length, the side profile of the hat, and the bent left leg in a walking pose.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's smiling face, glasses, red star on the hat, and the full school uniform with red necktie.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm's position, the side of the hat, and the dynamic leg pose.
attribute_clothing_style: Black Japanese sailor-style school uniform with a red necktie, short pleated skirt, black knee-high socks (one with a red band), and a large dark ushanka hat with a red star emblem. The style blends traditional schoolwear with Soviet military influences.
attribute_pose: The doll is posed in a dynamic walking motion, with the right leg forward and left leg bent back, right arm bent at the elbow and raised, left arm slightly bent and at the side, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with a wide mouth, closed eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a cheerful and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight black hair styled in high twin ponytails with some loose strands framing the face.
